form.formComment: Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 10 at Kalgoorlie Rtg 58+ on April 3 over 1200m, 7 len behind Marines Cry with 58.5kg at $31. The start before that 10th of 12 at Esperance Prov Series on March 1 over 1100m, 8 len behind Meat Pie Artie carrying 58.5kg at $101. Not a good sign last start so looking elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 10 at Kalgoorlie Rtg 58+ on April 3 over 1200m, 7 len behind Marines Cry with 58.5kg at $31. The start before that 10th of 12 at Esperance Prov Series on March 1 over 1100m, 8 len behind Meat Pie Artie carrying 58.5kg at $101. Not a good sign last start so looking elsewhere.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of seven months. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at Northam Cl3 September 14 over 1000m, soft track; 6 len behind Magali Magic with 57kg at $31. When resuming last campaign sixth of 9 at Northam Cl3 July 16 over 1000m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Desert Dancing with 57.5kg at $16. Expecting her to hit the ground running this campaign.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Resuming today after a break of seven months. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at Northam Cl3 September 14 over 1000m, soft track; 6 len behind Magali Magic with 57kg at $31. When resuming last campaign sixth of 9 at Northam Cl3 July 16 over 1000m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Desert Dancing with 57.5kg at $16. Expecting her to hit the ground running this campaign.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early stages. Lay outwards rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Dongara Clb 48+ on April 4 over 1100m, 4 len behind Cozzies Choice carrying 58kg at $2.60. The race before that ran last in a small field at York on March 15 over 1200m, 9 len behind Marines Cry with 57kg at $9.50. Has been racing well. Should go well in this line up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Dongara Clb 48+ on April 4 over 1100m, 4 len behind Cozzies Choice carrying 58kg at $2.60. The race before that ran last in a small field at York on March 15 over 1200m, 9 len behind Marines Cry with 57kg at $9.50. Has been racing well. Should go well in this line up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: When racing in restricted room was buffeted for a short distance near the 200m.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last of 12 at Albany Rtg 58+ on April 5 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind Niccy's Affair with 54kg at $151. The start before that ran last of 8 at York on March 15 over 1100m, 6 len behind Scream carrying 57.5kg at $18. Safely held again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8.5). At the latest run ran last of 12 at Albany Rtg 58+ on April 5 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind Niccy's Affair with 54kg at $151. The start before that ran last of 8 at York on March 15 over 1100m, 6 len behind Scream carrying 57.5kg at $18. Safely held again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay outwards entering the home straight.
Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.
Worked hard three wide early until gaining the lead at the 800m.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by 1.3 len at Ascot Cl1 April 3 over 1000m defeating Scenic George carrying 51kg at $17. The run before that 7th of 9 at Ascot Cl1 on March 11 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Slip The Jab carrying 51kg at $14. Backs up quickly and is expected to run well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). At the latest run won by 1.3 len at Ascot Cl1 April 3 over 1000m defeating Scenic George carrying 51kg at $17. The run before that 7th of 9 at Ascot Cl1 on March 11 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Slip The Jab carrying 51kg at $14. Backs up quickly and is expected to run well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung outwards rounding the home turn.
Bumped on jumping. Carried inwards and eased near the 1100m.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at Northam Rtg 46+ October 30 over 1100m, 4 len behind Rock Of Kaha carrying 56kg at $5.50. First up last campaign fourth of 7 at Bunbury Cl1 July 6 over 1100m, in the wet; 1.5 len behind Top Of The Walk carrying 58kg at $15. Expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1). Resumes. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at Northam Rtg 46+ October 30 over 1100m, 4 len behind Rock Of Kaha carrying 56kg at $5.50. First up last campaign fourth of 7 at Bunbury Cl1 July 6 over 1100m, in the wet; 1.5 len behind Top Of The Walk carrying 58kg at $15. Expected to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Unable to secure clear running for the majority of the straight.
Steadied near the 1000m. Raced wide throughout. Hung out throughout.
Shifted outwards and bumped on jumping.

form.formComment: Returns from a 62-day let-up. Most recently raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 10 at Mt Barker Cl2 on February 8 over 1850m, 8 len behind Safari Boy carrying 54kg at $101. Before that raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 11 at Esperance Cl2 on January 17 over 2000m, 13 len behind Titan Rising with 55kg at $71. Expect a better run this time around.
